paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58, with a change of -1.05% compared to the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, dated July 23, 2026. This news item is the most recent development.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes, and other 8-K forms related to the notes offering and Everson's resignation.
